title: euodia daniellii var. villicarpa
intro: Euodia daniellii var. villicarpa, also known as Chinese cinnamon or Taiwanese cassia, is a plant species native to Taiwan and parts of China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Euodia daniellii var. villicarpa include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating pain. Herbal preparations of Euodia daniellii var. villicarpa often involve using the bark, leaves, or roots to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
